# Andrea Longo

> Senior Java Developer e consulente freelance con quasi 10 anni di esperienza su sistemi enterprise in Italia.

Andrea Longo è un backend e frontend developer freelance (P.IVA) specializzato in Java, Spring Boot e integrazione di sistemi. Ha lavorato su progetti ad alta complessità per clienti enterprise come Luxottica (piattaforma prenotazioni per 2.000+ cliniche), CRIF (open banking), Almaviva (SAP Fiori) e Lottomatica (gaming & lottery). Attualmente collabora con LIS Holding sul sistema "Web Console GLS".

## Competenze principali

- **Backend**: Java 1.8 / 21, Spring Boot, Spring Security, Spring Batch, JPA/Hibernate, Microservices, REST, SOAP, ActiveMQ, EJB 3.1
- **Frontend**: Angular 8/9, JavaScript, TypeScript, jQuery, HTML5/CSS3, Bootstrap, SASS
- **Database**: MongoDB, Oracle DB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server
- **DevOps & Tools**: GIT, Maven, Docker, Jenkins, Ansible, Kibana, GlassFish, Tomcat, JBoss
- **Testing**: JUnit, Mockito, Selenium, JMeter

## Settori di esperienza

Healthcare · Financial Services & FinTech · Gaming & Betting · Retail & E-commerce · Pubblica Amministrazione

## Certificazioni

- MongoDB SI Architect Certification — MongoDB (2025)
- MongoDB SI Associate Certification — MongoDB (2025)
- Foundations of Project Management — Google (2024)
- Scrum Fundamentals Certified — SCRUMstudy (2021)

## Esperienza professionale

- **11/2023 — Attuale**: Backend & Frontend Developer @ LIS Holding (Freelance) — Spring Boot, Angular 8, Oracle DB, Ansible, ActiveMQ
- **06/2021 — 12/2025**: Software Developer @ Luxottica (Freelance) — Spring Boot, jQuery, MongoDB, MySQL, Jenkins
- **04/2020 — 02/2021**: Backend & Frontend Developer @ Besidetech/CRIF — Angular 9, Spring Batch, JPA
- **09/2019 — 03/2020**: Software Developer @ Besidetech/Nesea — Spring Boot, integrazione sistemi lottery
- **04/2019 — 09/2019**: Software Developer @ Besidetech/Ringmaster — Betting & Gaming, Spring Batch, Quartz
- **05/2018 — 04/2019**: Backend & Frontend Developer @ Netcom Group/Almaviva — SAP Fiori, JSP, CoffeeScript
- **03/2017 — 04/2018**: IT Consultant @ CSP/Tecnositaf — Selenium, Docker, Jenkins, EJB 3.1, PostgreSQL

## Disponibilità

Disponibile come freelance con P.IVA per nuove collaborazioni su progetti enterprise, in Italia e da remoto.
